tests.name: test_int09_chat_with_erp_question
tests.description: INT-09: AI answers a business question about ERPNext.

tests.name: test_int10_chat_preserves_conversation
tests.description: INT-10: Second message with history receives context-aware reply.

tests.name: test_int11_api_key_info_after_chat
tests.description: INT-11: get_api_key_info works immediately after a send_message call.

tests.name: test_int12_settings_persist_across_requests
tests.description: INT-12: Prisma AI Settings are consistent across two reads.

tests.name: test_int13_payload_builder_api_exists
tests.description: INT-13: payload_builder module method is reachable via API.

tests.name: test_int14_submission_with_invalid_doc_returns_error
tests.description: INT-14: Submitting a non-existent Salary Slip returns structured error.

tests.name: test_int15_connection_test_returns_structured_result
tests.description: INT-15: LHDN connection test endpoint returns structured JSON.

tests.name: test_int16_exemption_tester_endpoint_exists
tests.description: INT-16: Exemption tester API endpoint is reachable.

tests.name: test_int17_salary_slip_lhdn_fields_complete_for_submission
tests.description: INT-17: A Salary Slip has all required fields for LHDN XML generation.

tests.name: test_int05_resubmit_api_exists
tests.description: INT-05: resubmit_to_lhdn whitelisted method is reachable.

tests.name: test_int07_dev_tools_status_check
tests.description: INT-07: Dev tools system status endpoint returns data.

tests.name: test_int08_resubmission_log_list
tests.description: INT-08: LHDN Resubmission Log list is queryable.

tests.name: test_int01_list_employees
tests.description: INT-01: GET /api/resource/Employee returns a list (payroll foundation).

tests.name: test_int02_list_salary_slips
tests.description: INT-02: GET /api/resource/Salary Slip returns accessible records.

tests.name: test_int03_company_has_lhdn_fields
tests.description: INT-03: Test company has LHDN custom fields populated.

tests.name: test_int04_salary_slip_lhdn_status_field
tests.description: INT-04: Most recent Salary Slip has LHDN status field accessible.
